title: Opinion: No one in health care should be called a ‘provider’
description: The word “provider” in health care turns the relationship between patient and physician into a commercial transaction, argues the American College of Physicians.
content: The word “provider” in health care turns the relationship between patient and physician into a commercial transaction, argues the American College of Physicians.
